behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file path, both method names, the old expected text fragment, do_sample=False requirement, and temperature prohibition — all specifics tested are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction describes what's broken (non-determinism, default do_sample=True) and requirements, but the Test Requirements section does enumerate the fix fairly explicitly; still, it describes behavior not exact code edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only assert do_sample=False literal kwarg, absence of temperature, and removal of old text — any correct fix meeting these constraints passes regardless of variable names/lines.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Since integration tests require GPU+3B model, AST inspection is justified and documented; also runs ruff subprocess and git diff subprocess.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub can't pass — tests require 3+ generate() calls with do_sample=False literal, removal of temperature kwarg, removal of specific text fragment, plus class structure preservation.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three requirements in instruction.md (expected text removal, do_sample=False, no temperature) are each covered by dedicated tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived) and tagged with [static]/[pr_diff]/[agent_config].

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code/test modification, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths, method names, and commands appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The file is named but localization within it is part of the task; no exact line numbers for the fix are given (approximate line refs ~102, ~118 are for orientation).
